user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new comp off approver, so that compensatory off requests are routed to the correct approvers by location
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Comp Off Approvers screen; When I click Add new comp off approver and define the location(s) and approver(s); Then the comp off approver configuration is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view comp off approvers with their locations and approver hierarchy, so that I can verify approval routing
acceptance_criteria: Given comp off approvers exist; When I open the Comp Off Approvers screen; Then each record is listed with its location(s) and approver(s)

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing comp off approver, so that I can update approvers as the organization changes
acceptance_criteria: Given a comp off approver is listed; When I click Edit and update the location(s) or approver(s); Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the comp off approver list, so that I always see the latest routing configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Comp Off Approvers screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
